title: Eriochrysis filiformis
taxonomy: Eriochrysis filiformis is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. The classification of Eriochrysis filiformis is as follows: it is a genus of plants within the family Eriochrysideae, which is part of the subfamily Chloridoideae. This subfamily is a part of the large and diverse family Poaceae. Poaceae is commonly known as the grass family. Eriochrysis filiformis is a type of grass native to the tropical regions.
